title: MSpleef
body:
# ❄️ MSpleef – FFA Spleef Plugin with Custom Arenas

**MSpleef** is a competitive and dynamic Minecraft plugin designed for **FFA (Free For All)** spleef battles. It introduces advanced mechanics such as destructible layers, active PvP, fall damage, and fully customizable arenas — perfect for servers seeking a fresh twist on the classic spleef experience.

---

## ⚙️ Features

- **Multi-layer Custom Arenas**  
  Up to 2147483647 layers spaced 4 blocks apart, each breaking automatically over time (first layer after 1m30, then one per minute).

- **Full PvP**  
  Everyone fights for themselves!

- **Balanced Default Kit**:
  - ⚔️ Mace WindBurst I (damage reduced ×2)
  - 🛡️ Full Iron Armor with Protection I
  - 🍎 2 Golden Apples
  - 💨 3 Wind Charges
  - 🪠 Netherite Shovel

- **MiniMessage Support**  
  All messages are formatted using [MiniMessage](https://docs.advntr.dev/minimessage/) for full customization and styling.

---

## 💬 Commands

```bash
/joinspleef <arenaID>
```
- **Description**: Join an existing spleef arena.
- **Permission**: `martispleef.joinarena`

```bash
/createarena <arenaID> <x> <y> <z> <maxLayers> <maxSize>
```
- **Description**: Create a new customizable arena.
- **Permission**: `martispleef.createarena`

```bash
/adminspleef <arenaID> <player|*> [start]
```
- **Description**: Admin command to manage players and start games.
- **Permission**: `martispleef.admin`

---

## 🔐 Permissions

```yaml
martispleef.joinarena:
  description: Allows a player to join an arena
  default: op

martispleef.createarena:
  description: Allows arena creation
  default: op

martispleef.admin:
  description: Grants access to admin commands
  default: op
```

---

## 🧪 Compatibility

- **Minecraft version supported**: `1.21.4` only  
- **No external dependencies required**  
- Fully **standalone** and easy to install
